title: premna interrupta
intro: Premna interrupta, also known as Java tea or Premna, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Premna interrupta include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Premna interrupta can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to create a variety of herbal preparations.
